metadata.name: make-templates
metadata.summary: Tool to produce templates for IOI-style tasks from an input/output description.

functions.name: make_templates.tree.indent
documentation: Adds an indentation level to a multi-line string.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.Length
documentation: Class representing a length expression.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.VarType
documentation: Class representing a type.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.VarReference
documentation: Class representing a reference to a variable.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.Instruction
documentation: Class supertype grouping instructions.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.UserCode
documentation: Class representing the code to be inserted by users.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.Block
documentation: Class representing a block of instructions.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.VarDeclaration
documentation: Class representing a declaration of homgeneous variables.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.Repeat
documentation: Class representing a repeated block of code.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.InOutSequence
documentation: Class representing a read or write instruction for an inlined vector or matrix row.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.InOutLine
documentation: Class representing a read or write instruction for a line of items.

classes.name: make_templates.tree.FormatLine
documentation: Class representing a write instruction for an integer with format string (without implicit newline).

classes.name: make_templates.main.FailOnError
documentation: Error listener to make sure that parsing errors are not ignored.
